name: token-cost
installHints: AiPlus release archives install both `aiplus` and `aiplus-token-cost`.
Use `aiplus-token-cost` directly or `aiplus agent token-cost` through the bundled CLI.

doctorChecks.description: Standalone token-cost module docs are present.

notes: Bundled docs and metadata are public.
The runtime reads local AiPlus dispatch logs and writes local token-cost snapshots.
No API keys or secret values are bundled.
Token-cost reads usage counters, not prompts, task content, API responses, or secret payloads.
Standalone source of truth is izhiwen/AiPlus-Token-Cost v0.1.0; this directory is the AiPlus bundled module metadata surface.
